text_block_list.name: Prospective Student A
text_block_list.text:
AaaaaAAH?! Look, it's Curren! Oh no, she's so
cuteeee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tracen is holding an open campus today, and
Curren's surrounded by a crowd of younger
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Prospective Student B
text_block_list.text:
Uh, um... You posted that you're going to run in
your muse dress today, right? The one that
Beauty Anshinzawa designed?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yup, I'll be out in my muse racewear for the
scrimmage, so look forward to it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Prospective Student B
text_block_list.text:
I will! I can't believe I get to see you in it up close!
I'm so glad I came all the way to Tracen!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Curren! Looks like you're ready to go!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh! Hi, Bakushin O! Let's make this a great race!

text_block_list.name: Prospective Student C
text_block_list.text: Wow, the scrimmage has Curren Chan and Sakura Bakushin O?! This is gonna be a sprinter showdown!

text_block_list.name: Prospective Student A
text_block_list.text:
A sprinter... showdown?! The competition's tough,
but I know Curren'll win it! Good luck, Curreeen!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks! ♪ I'll give it all I've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a crowd this electrified, it doesn't feel like
just a scrimmage. The runners take off like it's a
real showdown!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: All right, I'm in great shape!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Curren's hot on my heels! But not for
long—haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin, Bakushiiin! Baku Baku! Shin Shin!
BAKUSHIIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Prospective Student A
text_block_list.text: Whoa?! That's crazy fast! Bakushin is amazing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Whew, that was a good Bakushin! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Prospective Student B
text_block_list.text:
Wow... I can't believe that was real. Bakushin's
speed was the stuff of dreams!

text_block_list.name: Prospective Student C
text_block_list.text:
Right? I hope I get into Tracen! I wanna learn how
to Bakushin just like Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Prospective Student A
text_block_list.text:
Me too! I wanna Bakushin! Bakushiiin!
Bakushiiiiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Onlookers
text_block_list.text: Ba! Ku! Shin! Ba! Ku! Shiiin!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'll be right back!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin O! That was a really impressive
Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Why, thank you! I'm glad to hear that you
appreciate the power of Bakushining!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Of course! It's an expression of raw, true speed,
isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oooh! It is indeed! You completely get it!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yup, it feels like your Bakushin has a lot in
common with my cuteness.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You see, I aim to make everyone's heart leap with
a dazzling flash of speed.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Me flying across the track, sparkling like a
shooting star... That's the cute Curren I wanna
burn into everyone's memories! So I promise you,
I'll outrun your Bakushin next time!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Then I await your challenge! We've still got plenty
of races ahead of us!

text_block_list.name: Prospective Student A
text_block_list.text:
I think that's the most serious I've ever heard
Curren sound! The way she's so determined...
She's so cute!

text_block_list.name: Prospective Student B
text_block_list.text: Like, you can just see how passionate she is! You can feel it! CURREEEEN! YOU'LL WIN THE NEXT ONE!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Thanks, everyone! I'll train lots, okay?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But don't think we're done here yet! Bakushin O
and I will show you just how cute winning concerts
are! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin, Bakushin, Bakushin!
Bakushin, Bakushin, Bakushin!
Bakushin! Bakushin! Bakushin shiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Prospective Student C
text_block_list.text:
Woooo! Hehe, this song is so silly, but Curren's
totally nailing the crazy Bakushin energy!

text_block_list.name: Prospective Student A
text_block_list.text:
This over-the-top angle from Curren is so
unexpected, but so cute! Bakushins have never
looked this adorable!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O's song for the winning live is
upbeat and must take a ton of energy, but Curren
is rocking it. The crowd's going wild!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, your song is so fun, Bakushin O! I wanna try
doing a verse with the crowd too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
What should I use in place of Bakushin? ...Ooh,
let's do Kawaii!

text_block_list.name: Onlookers
text_block_list.text:
Kawaii, Kawaii, Kawaii!
Kawaii, Kawaii, Kawaii!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Thank you all for indulging me with that! ♪
C'mon, let's keep on singing together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The performance continues, alternating the fan
chant between Bakushin and Kawaii. Afterwards,
we get rave reviews that Curren's fan interaction
really made everyone feel like part of the show!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oooh, I see a "Luv Curren" sign out there! ♪

text_block_list.name: Prospective Student A
text_block_list.text:
No way?! Sh-she noticed... She's so cute, aaaaah I
can't! I LOVE YOU, CURREN! YOU'RE THE
CUTEST!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Bakushin O! I've got a really cute pose idea
to show everyone how much we appreciate their
support. Wanna try it?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But of course! What kind of pose are you
thinking?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Just do what I do! Ready... Here goes!

text_block_list.name: Curren & Bakushin
text_block_list.text: Luv U! ♪

text_block_list.name: Prospective Student C
text_block_list.text:
Th-they're so cuuuute! Literal angels of
adorableness! Thank you for my liiiife!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren may have lost the race, but she still seizes
the prospective students' hearts with her super
cute winning concert performance.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Here we go! Keep your eyes on me, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I've got plenty more Bakushins to go around!

text_block_list.name: Prospective Student C
text_block_list.text: Whoa... It's a winning contest between Cute Curren and Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Prospective Student A
text_block_list.text:
The clash of their styles is really heating things
up! I've never seen a concert like this!

text_block_list.name: Prospective Student B
text_block_list.text:
Everyone at Tracen's really out to win! They're
showing us just how determined students here are!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, if you make it into Tracen, I'll show you
what a blast bein' cute is! ♪

text_block_list.name: Onlookers
text_block_list.text:
I-I can't wait!
You're the cutest, Curren!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, I learn that most of the kids at the concert
applied to Tracen. Just goes to show how much
influence an influencer truly has...
